target_market_label.zh: 乌兹别克斯坦（O'zstandart / 国家电网）
target_market_label.zht: 烏茲別克斯坦（O'zstandart / 國家電網）

title.en: China-to-Uzbekistan Solar PV Inverter Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国光伏逆变器进入乌兹别克斯坦：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國光伏逆變器進入烏茲別克斯坦：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of common China solar PV inverter documentation against Uzbekistan O'zstandart conformity certification, O'z DSt / GOST / IEC evidence, national grid-operator (Uzenergo) connection requirements, IFC/EBRD lender technical specifications for internationally-financed projects, and 50 Hz grid expectations.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国光伏逆变器文件与乌兹别克斯坦O'zstandart符合性认证、O'z DSt/GOST/IEC证据、国家电网运营商（Uzenergo）并网要求、国际融资项目IFC/EBRD出借方技术规范及50Hz电网要求差距对照。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國光伏逆變器文件與烏茲別克斯坦O'zstandart符合性認證、O'z DSt/GOST/IEC證據、國家電網運營商（Uzenergo）併網要求、國際融資項目IFC/EBRD出借方技術規範及50Hz電網要求差距對照。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, O'zstandart conformity scope determination, Uzenergo grid-connection approval, lender technical-specification qualification decision, customs determination, or market-access approval. Exporters, importers, developers, and installers should verify current Uzbekistan, O'zstandart, Uzenergo, Ministry of Energy, IFC/EBRD lender, transport, and customs requirements with qualified professionals before shipment, tender submission, or installation.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、O'zstandart符合性适用范围裁定、Uzenergo并网批准、出借方技术规范资格结论、海关裁定或市场准入批准。出口商、进口商、开发商和安装方在出货、投标或安装前应与合格专业人士核验现行乌兹别克斯坦、O'zstandart、Uzenergo、能源部、IFC/EBRD出借方、运输及海关要求。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、O'zstandart符合性適用範圍裁定、Uzenergo併網批准、出借方技術規範資格結論、海關裁定或市場准入批准。出口商、進口商、開發商和安裝方在出貨、投標或安裝前應與合格專業人士核驗現行烏茲別克斯坦、O'zstandart、Uzenergo、能源部、IFC/EBRD出借方、運輸及海關要求。

answer_first.en: For solar PV inverters exported from China to Uzbekistan, the main baseline is O'zstandart mandatory conformity certification for regulated electrical products, using O'z DSt national standards (many derived from GOST or IEC). The real gaps between Chinese and Uzbekistan requirements are: obtaining O'zstandart conformity certification; bridging GOST/O'z DSt versus IEC test-report acceptance; meeting National Electric Grid of Uzbekistan (Uzenergo/regional energy companies) grid-connection technical conditions; and, for internationally-financed projects (ACWA Power, Masdar, IFC/EBRD-backed), satisfying lender technical specifications that may demand IEC 62109 and IEC 62116 test reports regardless of local minimums. The nominal voltage gap is small (China and Uzbekistan both use 220/380 V, 50 Hz), but grid-code settings, O'zstandart certification, and lender requirements must be confirmed separately.
answer_first.zh: 中国光伏逆变器出口乌兹别克斯坦时，基础要求是O'zstandart对受监管电气产品的强制符合性认证，采用O'z DSt国家标准（大量派生自GOST或IEC）。中国与乌兹别克斯坦要求之间的主要差距包括：获得O'zstandart符合性认证；GOST/O'z DSt与IEC测试报告认可的衔接；满足乌兹别克斯坦国家电网（Uzenergo/区域能源公司）的并网技术条件；对于国际融资项目（ACWA Power、马斯达尔、IFC/EBRD支持项目），出借方技术规范可能要求IEC 62109和IEC 62116测试报告而不论当地最低要求。名义电压差距较小（中国和乌兹别克斯坦均使用220/380V、50Hz），但并网参数、O'zstandart认证和出借方要求需分别确认。
answer_first.zht: 中國光伏逆變器出口烏茲別克斯坦時，基礎要求是O'zstandart對受監管電氣產品的強制符合性認證，採用O'z DSt國家標準（大量派生自GOST或IEC）。中國與烏茲別克斯坦要求之間的主要差距包括：獲得O'zstandart符合性認證；GOST/O'z DSt與IEC測試報告認可的銜接；滿足烏茲別克斯坦國家電網（Uzenergo/區域能源公司）的併網技術條件；對於國際融資項目（ACWA Power、馬斯達爾、IFC/EBRD支持項目），出借方技術規範可能要求IEC 62109和IEC 62116測試報告而不論當地最低要求。名義電壓差距較小（中國和烏茲別克斯坦均使用220/380V、50Hz），但併網參數、O'zstandart認證和出借方要求需分別確認。

editorial_controls.source_policy: Official regulator, standards body, grid operator, lender technical specification, customs, or primary legal source preferred. Local PDFs are not accepted.
editorial_controls.change_control: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, verification flag, and last_verified before human_reviewed can be true.
